name: Rasberry Curd
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree the raspberries and strain through a fine mesh to remove seeds.
2. Measure 1 1/2 cups puree, heat in a non-reactive saucepan.
3. Stir in sugar and butter. Taste and add lemon juice as desired.
4. Whisk eggs and egg yolks until combined.
5. Warm the eggs slightly by stirring into the hot puree.
6. Return to the pan and cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until thickened and reaches 170°F (76°C).
7. Chill before serving.
Makes about 2 cups, enough for one 9-inch tart.
